title: Al₂O₃
caption: FIG. 6. The measured (circles) and calculated (line) thickness profiles of a 500cycle deposition process of Al2O3 from Al(CH3)3 and H2O in PillarHall V R prototype 3 with a nominal channel gap height of 0.5 l m. The length L of the channel was 1 mm which gives a structural aspect ratio of 2000.
